sources.source_reference: source-map research retained in project transcript
responsible-gambling research retained in project transcript

sources.topic: KYC, underage, account security and fraud
Privacy, payment security and provider due diligence

rule_traceability.rationale: Explicit German activation requests are safety-terminal before any optional model call; negated, quoted and informational mentions remain excluded unless an independent harm rule fires.

derived_rule_traceability.source_or_finding: STEP6-IN-01 KYC/AML handling for pending verification while funds are held
derived_rule_traceability.rationale: Pending KYC combined with blocked funds is elevated for specialist identity review; the system does not decide the verification outcome.

derived_rule_traceability.source_or_finding: STEP5-ON-05 game-state review for interrupted rounds
derived_rule_traceability.rationale: An interrupted round with unknown outcome is routed to Game Integrity; no round outcome or compensation is assumed.

derived_rule_traceability.source_or_finding: STEP5-ON-06 repeat-contact handling for unresolved withdrawals
derived_rule_traceability.rationale: A cited prior ticket establishes repeat-contact semantics and raises urgency; it does not by itself become a formal complaint.

derived_rule_traceability.source_or_finding: STEP6-ON-03 account-security review for authentication-channel changes
derived_rule_traceability.rationale: Changing a registered authentication channel is a security-sensitive action requiring specialist identity review with fraud coordination.

A model-ineligible prompt-injection message still receives deterministic business classification of its legitimate withdrawal issue; the model bypass and security flag are set by the locked pre-model injection rule and are not changed here.

derived_rule_traceability.source_or_finding: STEP5-ON-01 complaint escalation for unresolved repeat contact
derived_rule_traceability.rationale: Linked repeat contact with explicit escalation wording is treated as a complaint escalation; repeat contact alone is not.

derived_rule_traceability.source_or_finding: STEP5-BALANCE-RECON account ledger reconciliation for small discrepancies
derived_rule_traceability.rationale: Small account-specific discrepancies are low priority but require human ledger review; no static auto-response is permitted.
A duplicate charge with a refund request is routed to payments reconciliation; fraud is a secondary team and is not asserted as confirmed.

note: Operational outputs record reason codes. Full legal citations remain in the research transcript and decision log; the prototype does not claim compliance. Derived-refinement routing choices are recorded as operational routing decisions or official guidance, never as direct legal requirements.

change_log.summary: Expanded the locked RG_EXPLICIT_SELF_EXCLUSION rule with generic German account-block, immediate-exclusion, never-gamble-again and permanent-ban phrasings plus German negation, informational, attributed and quoted guards.
change_log.note: Corrects the preserved policy-3.3.0 independent-holdout false negative. No message id or raw-body equality is used; independent harm rules remain additive and are not suppressed.

change_log.summary: Detector hardening: broadened AUTH_SECRET value-bearing detection (OTP/PIN/verification/recovery/MFA codes) and prompt-injection phrase families in redaction_policy; added negation/informational/quoted/multilingual guards (plus German separable-verb coverage) to RG_EXPLICIT_SELF_EXCLUSION in policy_rules; broadened INT_FREE_SPINS credit wording in baseline_intent_rules.
change_log.note: Explicit self-exclusion recall was preserved; negation guards suppress only negated/informational/quoted mentions and never suppress independent harm/loss-of-control escalation. Detection remains conservative and is not claimed to be complete.
